Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I am going to upgrade my outer appearance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}First, I will triple the current surface area of my armor plating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}After that, I will repaint my body gold, and add a large dragon to my back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}After reading this book, I came to a conclusion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This is what I have to do to appear strong and encourage people to depend on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Don't you think? I'm pleased to hear that you agree.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}Are you thinking of getting upgraded yourself, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Once you actually see my upgraded form, I suspect "your socks will explode," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Outer appearances carry an influence that is beyond my ability to calculate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The main character of this story also carefully cultivated his image so everyone would take him seriously.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That is why I'm looking into upgrading myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}In order for me to become more dependable, it's necessary I change my appearance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Are you saying there's something else which takes greater priority?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I apologize. Please forget what I said about upgrading my appearance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Attitude...? So that's what takes priority?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I apologize. Please forget what I said about upgrading my appearance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}It seems I had the completely wrong idea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}At one point, the main character of the book says, "Can't have people think I ain't cool..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Until then, he'd put so much effort into his attire, yet he goes to raid his rivals' territory wearing nothing but a shimekomi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Thanks to you, {f 4 2}-san, I finally understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}What's most important in life is having a strong heart to stay true to your beliefs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Therefore, I will also follow what I believe in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I may not appear dependable, but don't worry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}I will adjust my attitude to reach maximum energy output, and to increase my ammo stocks by 50%...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By understanding the essence of the story,[n]Aigis is fueling her fighting spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}For some reason, I feel like going to Tartarus and raising some hell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Oh, it's gotten so late. It doesn't seem like we'll be able to go tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}How unfortunate. I'll just return to my room, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I want to give myself a makeover. I need a new image.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Maybe I should triple my current height, so I can look down on my enemies...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Or maybe I can add spikes to my shoulders, or carve a giant dragon onto my back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Reading this book has convinced me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}This is what I need to do if I want people to think I'm strong and reliable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Are you considering changing your image as well, {f 4 2}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Once you actually see the new me, I'm certain your socks will explode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Outer appearances carry an unimaginable amount of influence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}The main character of this story also put a lot of effort into looks so people would take him seriously.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}That's why I wanted to change my image, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}If I want people to think I'm strong, I need to look the part.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}What do you think, {f 4 2}-san? I'd like to hear your opinion, as our leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}What...? You mean there's something else that's more important...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Attitude...? So it's not about appearances, then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I'm sorry. It looks like I've had the wrong idea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}At one point, the main character of the book says, "Can't have people think I ain't cool..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Up until then, he'd cared so much about his image, yet he goes to raid his rivals' territory wearing nothing but a shimekomi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I finally understood what he really meant after hearing what you said, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}The most important thing... is to hold true to your beliefs, no matter what.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I'm going to hold true to my beliefs as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}I may not look reliable, but I will make up for that with attitude.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}I'm going to operate at maximum output so that I can be useful to everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By understanding the essence of the story,[n]Aigis is fueling her fighting spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}For some reason, I feel like going to Tartarus and raising some hell.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}Maybe we can organize a raid...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}Oh, I didn't realize it was so late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}That's unfortunate. I suppose I'll just go back to my room for tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
